name: Private Libraries
description: Restricts which media each user sees. Titles appear when requested through Jellyseerr or added from a home-screen widget, using Jellyfin's per-user allowed-tags whitelist.
overview: Per-user media restriction via Jellyseerr requests and a home-screen widget.

versions.changelog: Initial release: per-user allowed-tags whitelist, Jellyseerr webhook grants, home-screen selection widget, reconcile scheduled task.
